label: cmd/riido
role: CLI/local daemon adapter. Parses flags/env and composes local-only surfaces.

label: internal/agentbridge
role: Provider-neutral C4 run/request/event/result domain.

label: internal/agentbridge/session
role: Per-run session actor over the process port and protocol driver.

label: internal/agentbridge/runtimeactor
role: One runtime mailbox/slot and capability reconciliation.

label: internal/agentbridge/supervisor
role: Daemon control loop, task claim/dispatch, workdir preparation, event ingest delegation.

label: internal/agentbridge/controlplane
role: Task source/reporter ports and memory/file adapters.

label: internal/agentbridge/controlplane/taskdbplane
role: Local task DB source/reporter adapter.

label: internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane
role: SaaS polling/reporting adapter over assignment contracts.

label: internal/provider/{claude,codex,openclaw,cursor}
role: Concrete provider adapter ACLs.

label: internal/process / internal/process/processexec
role: Process port, fake process, and os/exec adapter.

label: internal/workdir
role: Isolated run workdir and native config materialization.

label: internal/scheduling
role: Pure runtime eligibility/selection rules.

label: internal/policy
role: C7 security/policy decisions.

label: internal/hostintegration
role: C11 distribution/store/host pure models.

label: internal/riidoapi
role: Local IPC JSON API over Unix socket or Windows named pipe.

label: internal/taskdb
role: Public daemon copy of riido-task-db.v1 guarded mutation adapter.

label: internal/mwsdbridge / internal/project
role: mwsd ACL and workspace/task projection.

label: internal/ir/ingest
role: Daemon-side event append/redaction boundary.

label: tools/storecontract
role: Store distribution contract verifier.

label: tools/riidogen
role: Local generator for executable Riido contracts.
